details: The agent ran appropriate kubectl commands against the cluster (get deployments/replicasets/pods, get events, describe deployment) and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False and ProgressDeadlineExceeded, with the old v1 ReplicaSet still serving traffic; and (2) the root cause is the invalid image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ImagePullBackOff on the new v2 pod.
